name: 婚禮上仇人下跪求饒
description: 曾經將女主踩在腳下的獅家人在她的盛大婚禮上跪地求饒，完成了地位的徹底反轉。這是所有觀眾期待的終極爽點——最風光的時刻遇上最落魄的仇人。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Zanthy, the Lion's family has completely fallen apart. We don't have a home anymore. Only you can save us now. Please. I am begging you. Come back. ... If you don't forgive us, we won't get up today.
